codeReview.summary: The partner-detail-page feature has been implemented comprehensively. The implementation includes a complete partner detail view at /partners/:id with all fields from the partners table displayed in an organized layout. Includes proper 404 handling for non-existent partners, authentication protection, Indonesian language labels, responsive design with CSS grid, and proper error boundary components. The code follows TypeScript best practices with proper type definitions.

issues.description: Uses window.location.href for navigation in the back link. While this works, it causes a full page reload instead of client-side navigation.
Uses inline CSS-in-JS styles instead of Tailwind CSS classes which are used elsewhere in the project. This creates inconsistency in styling approach but doesn't affect functionality.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The errorComponent pattern in TanStack Router uses custom error components (PartnerNotFound, Unauthorized) which provides good UX for different error states.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Route config includes errorComponent with proper error handling in partners.$id.tsx

sharedStateObservations.observation: All partner fields are displayed including formatted dates using Indonesian locale (id-ID) which demonstrates localization best practices.
The getPartnerById server function properly validates input and throws appropriate errors which are caught and handled by the route's errorComponent.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: app/server/partners.ts getPartnerById with validation and error throwing
